reasoning: Plan is well-structured and technically sound, but contains incorrect file paths in step 3 that would cause implementation confusion. The actual geometry system files are under src/visual/systems/, not src/visual/geometrySystems/.

issues.issue: Wrong file paths: plan references src/visual/geometrySystems/pointCloud.ts and src/visual/geometrySystems/ribbonField.ts but actual paths are src/visual/systems/pointCloud.ts and src/visual/systems/ribbonField.ts

Step says 'replace layeredNoise() calls' but layeredNoise() is only used in the slow modulation section. The bulk of existing displacement (radial expansion, twist, drift, jitter) uses direct sin/cos — plan should clarify whether those are also being replaced or just augmented with noise-based displacement.

VisualParams already has structureComplexity and motionAmplitude which could drive displacement scale without new fields. Adding displacementScale and noiseEvolutionRate may be redundant if they are simple derivations — consider computing them at uniform-update time instead of expanding the VisualParams type.

requiredChanges: Fix file paths in step 3: src/visual/geometrySystems/ → src/visual/systems/ for both pointCloud.ts and ribbonField.ts
suggestedImprovements: Clarify in step 2 whether existing sin/cos displacement layers (radial expansion, twist, drift) are replaced, removed, or preserved alongside the new noise displacement
Consider whether step 5 additions to VisualParams are necessary or if displacement scale can be derived inline from existing params during uniform updates
